label: Lantern Ration Vault
description: The Lantern Ration Vault forms a low-ceilinged service chamber behind the curtained ration counter, its ferrocrete walls sheathed in impact-scarred adamantine panels that match the repurposed inspection hall. Stacked munitorum crates, seal-tinned casks, and numbered rack shelving organize stores by quarantine lot and issue date, with stenciled warnings repeating along every tier. Lumen strips recessed behind mesh guards lay rigid bands of light across the floor, while a brass-grilled vent and air-scrubber housings keep the space dry, cold, and antiseptic. A narrow slit-visor cut high into the wall admits a bruise-tinted wash from Cyrenth Vale’s aurora, turning labels and wax seals into hard, colorless relief.
